response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with entrepreneurial experience, but lacks the depth of AI/ML expertise and cloud strategy leadership required for a Principal Engineer role. Their background is more hands-on and broad rather than specialized in AI-driven product strategy.
strengths: Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure systems
Strong engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, performance optimization)
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI/ML expertise or cloud strategy leadership
Seniority (15+ years) but not at the Director-level IC scope
Broad but shallow focus rather than deep specialization in AI/cloud
